promoting.title: Northern Colorado Market Update — July 2026: Home Prices, Inventory & Mid-Year Trends

platforms.name: Google Business Profile
platforms.caption:
Our July 2026 Northern Colorado Market Update is live! 🏡

Mid-year check-in across Fort Collins, Loveland, Windsor, and Greeley:
• Fort Collins median ~$612K — stabilizing after a soft spring
• Loveland steady at ~$507K with 12% more inventory than last year
• Windsor holding near ~$585K — strong buyer leverage above $700K
• Greeley remains #1 for affordability at ~$430K

More inventory + stable rates + seller concessions = the best summer market for buyers since 2022. Sellers: pricing accuracy and presentation matter more than ever.

Read the full report 👉 https://saahomes.com/blog/northern-colorado-market-update-july-2026/

📞 (970) 999-1407 — Schwartz and Associates, SAA Homes

platforms.name: Facebook
platforms.caption:
📊 July 2026 Northern Colorado Market Update — Mid-Year Edition

Our team just published the latest breakdown of home prices, inventory, and trends across Fort Collins, Loveland, Windsor, and Greeley. Here's what we're seeing:

🏘️ Fort Collins — median single-family ~$612K, recovering from a soft April and stabilizing through late spring. Days on market averaging 38 days, with solid activity under $600K.

🌲 Loveland — the most balanced market in the region at ~$507K median (+3.4% YoY). Inventory up 12% from last year, making it an excellent time for first-time buyers using CHFA assistance.

🏠 Windsor — premium pricing at ~$585K median. Buyers above $700K have significant negotiating room. Sellers need realistic pricing from day one.

🌄 Greeley — Northern Colorado's affordability anchor at ~$430K median. Multiple showings still common under $400K. New construction builders offering incentives.

Key takeaway: This is the most buyer-friendly summer market since 2022. More inventory, stable mortgage rates, and sellers offering concessions. But well-priced homes still attract strong interest quickly.

Full blog with city-by-city analysis ⟶ https://saahomes.com/blog/northern-colorado-market-update-july-2026/

Adam & Mandi Schwartz | SAA Homes
(970) 999-1407
